macro.title: GSEs buy MBS at measured pace in January, nudging mortgage rates lower
macro.what: Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac added a combined $12.5 billion in agency mortgage-backed securities (MBS) to their retained portfolios in January.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Why real estate brokers want national MLS access and why a federation may be the answer
macro.what: MLS executives warn a national MLS faces data, governance and antitrust hurdles, while a federation model could expand access.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: More Homeowners Have a Rate Above 6% Than a Rate Below 3% For the First Time in 5 Years

macro.title: Homebuying Affordability Improves As Mortgage Rates Fall to Lowest Level in Over 3 Years
macro.what: Lower rates haven’t yet brought homebuyers off the sidelines, but hope is in the air as we approach spring
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: ‘Win more listings, make more money’ — Carlson lays out REMAX gameplan
housing.what: REMAX CEO Erik Carlson touted new brokerage partnerships, leadership hires and recent company transactions milestones.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Announcing the 2026 Finance Leaders
housing.what: HousingWire is proud to unveil the 2026 Finance Leaders, honoring 30 executives who are redefining financial leadership across mortgage, real estate and homebuilding
housing.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
housing.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Why the housing inventory map is so startling
housing.what: Listings rose 9% from last year, but 36 states are still below 2019 and Chicago and Connecticut remain about 70% under pre-pandemic supply.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: HomeServices of America signals a new era with brand refresh and clearer voice
housing.what: HomeServices of America rolled out a brand refresh, aiming to be a more visible, unified parent organization for its brands.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: A Portland room rental pilot puts new Oregon SRO rules to the test
housing.what: Oregon last year rewrote the rules for one of the oldest and cheapest housing types, single-room occupancy lodgings
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: West Palm Beach’s Luxury Housing Market Is Booming, With Sales Up 30%
housing.what: Luxury pending home sales in West Palm Beach posted a larger gain than any other major metro in January, rising almost six times faster than non luxury sales
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Redfin and Compass Partner to Expand Inventory and Seller Choice
housing.what: Today, Redfin announced a partnership with Compass International Holdings that will expand the number of homes buyers can discover on Redfin.com
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Denver Has a New Neighbor: Kiel Murphy Wins the Great American Home Search
housing.what: Redfin awards Murphy a home valued at more than $1 million for being the fastest person to successfully complete a nationwide scavenger hunt in the Redfin app Redfin today announce
housing.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.
